title: UniVault JU
description: The central knowledge hub for JU Aqaba students. Sharing past papers, summaries, and academic tools to empower the student community.

title: Sudoku Solver
description: Full-stack Sudoku Solver built with Node.js, Express, and React. Features a REST API for puzzle validation and solving using a backtracking algorithm.

title: Chat Room
description: A real-time chat application where users pick a username and start chatting instantly. Built using Node.js and Socket.IO for bidirectional communication.

title: Point of Sale (POS) System – CompuTech
description: A desktop-based Point of Sale (POS) system built with VB.NET and Microsoft Access. Includes user management, item and customer modules, and an order processing system with receipt generation.

title: Url Shortener
description: Fullstack project built with Express.js and MongoDB. It efficiently shortens URLs for easier sharing and management. Built with a responsive design to work across all devices.

title: PrintForge
description: A 3D printing file marketplace UI built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. Users can browse, search, and filter 3D printing files in a responsive design.

title: Dodgy Dave's Stock Prediction
description: React app that allows users to input stock tickers and generate predictions based on historical stock data. It fetches stock data from the Polygon API, processes it, and uses the Mistral AI API to generate a witty, confident stock prediction.

title: Assembly: Endgame
description: A React word-guessing game with a programming theme. Includes game logic, keyboard input, and confetti win effects. Tracks wrong guesses by striking out programming languages.

title: Chef Claude
description: Frontend project showcasing my proficiency in React.js. The user enters ingredients for the Claude API and receives back a recipe with those ingredients.

title: Netflix Clone
description: A React Netflix landing page clone with hero banner, feature highlights, and responsive design. Uses reusable components for sections and call-to-action buttons.
